title: byttneria urticifolia var. genuina
intro: Byttneria urticifolia var. genuina, also known as the stinging bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Byttneria urticifolia var. genuina include relief from skin irritations, allergic reactions, and insect bites, and it can also be used to treat wounds and promote healing, with herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
